user.title: Akuvox SmartPlus Sign-In
user.description: Choose a sign-in method to connect to your Akuvox SmartPlus account:

email_password_sign_in.title: Sign In with Email & Password
email_password_sign_in.description: Enter your Akuvox SmartPlus account credentials.

data.subdomain: Manually set the regional API subdomain

errors.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your email and password and try again.
errors.missing_credentials: Please enter both your email address and password.

sms_sign_in_warning.title: SMS Verification
sms_sign_in_warning.description:
⚠️ Warning ⚠️

Choosing this sign-in method will log you out of the SmartPlus app on your phone.

To stay logged in to the app and use both the app and this integration, please use the `App Tokens` sign-in method instead.

sms_sign_in.title: SMS Verification
sms_sign_in.description: Please enter your mobile phone number to receive your verification SMS:

data.subdomain: Manually set the regional API subdomain

app_tokens_sign_in.title: Sign In via App Tokens
app_tokens_sign_in.description:
Please enter your account details below.

ℹ️ To obtain your tokens please review the documentation.

data.subdomain: Manually set the regional API subdomain

verify_sms_code.title: SMS Code Verification
verify_sms_code.description: Please enter the SMS code you received.

data_description.sms_code: It may take up to 60 seconds to receive the SMS.

init.title: SmartPlus User Tokens & Event Configuration
init.description:
If you signed into the SmartPlus app on your device after adding the integration, you can update your user tokens below. This will allow Home Assistant to communicate with Akuvox's servers while you remain signed in on your device.

Please refer to the documentation for instructions on how to extract your token string.

data.country: The country registered in your Akuvox SmartPlus account
data.override: Use the following SmartLife account tokens:
data.subdomain: Manually set the regional API subdomain
